name: Attio
description: Attio is a flexible, data-driven CRM. Manage custom objects, people, companies, lists, and notes with powerful filtering and a relationship-first approach to customer data.

capabilities.name: list_records
capabilities.description: List records from any object (people, companies, or custom objects) with filtering.

capabilities.name: create_record
capabilities.description: Create a new record in any object with attribute values.

capabilities.name: search_records
capabilities.description: Search across all records by attribute values.

capabilities.name: list_objects
capabilities.description: List all objects (schemas) configured in the workspace.

capabilities.name: manage_lists
capabilities.description: Add or remove records from lists (pipelines, segments, collections).

capabilities.name: create_note
capabilities.description: Create a note attached to a record.
